creator: hiroo@oikumene.gcd.org
text:
Hello,

Currently, I do not have enough time to look at.
If it compiles, please commit it.
If I need to do something, I will look at it next weekend.
Sorry.

At Wed, 11 Jun 2008 12:30:30 UT,
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> 
> Maintainer of japanese/sj3,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/124481 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/124481
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
